titles.title: I've Got My Mind Made Up

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v3

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: /: I've got my mind made up, I've got my heart fixed right, I'm going with Jesus all the way. :/

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Am I a soldier of the cross, A follower of the Lamb, And shall I fear to own His cause, Or blush to speak His name?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: /: I've got my mind made up, I've got my heart fixed right, I'm going with Jesus all the way :/

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Must I be carried to the skies, On flowery bed of ease, While others fought to win the prize, And sailed the bloody seas?

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Are there no foes for me to face? Must I not stem the flood? Is this vile world friend to grace, To help me on to God?
